name: @life-ai-tools/agent-bridge
description: Reusable socket control plane for Claude Code agents — built ON the official @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk (query/Query/Transport + session APIs). Spawn, address-by-session-id, control (send/interrupt/permission/model) and stream agents over a WebSocket or unix socket. NO reimplementation of the stream-json control protocol — the SDK owns it.
